import asyncio, httpx
from src.config import settings

ELEVENLABS_TTS_URL = 'https://api.elevenlabs.io/v1/text-to-speech'

CALLERS = [
    {
        'file': 'assets/caller_1_spanish.mp3',
        'voice_id': 'pFZP5JQG7iQjIQuC4Bku',  # Lily - Spanish
        'text': '¡Ayuda! ¡Por favor, ayuda! Hubo un choque terrible en la calle Market con la Quinta. Mi esposo está atrapado en el carro. No puede salir. Hay humo saliendo del motor. ¡Por favor, manden una ambulancia rápido!',
    },
    {
        'file': 'assets/caller_2_mandarin.mp3',
        'voice_id': 'nPczCjzI2devNBz1zQrb',  # Brian - Chinese
        'text': '喂，我要报警。Market街和第五街路口发生了严重的车祸。我看到后座有一个小孩在哭。车里好像有两个人受伤了。路上到处都是碎片，请快点派人来。',
    },
    {
        'file': 'assets/caller_3_french.mp3',
        'voice_id': 'XB0fDUnXU5powFXDhCwa',  # Charlotte - French
        'text': \\"Allô, je suis le propriétaire du magasin en face. Il y a un accident grave sur Market Street. Je vois de la fumée qui sort du moteur, et maintenant je crois que ça prend feu! Il y a des gens qui essaient de sortir de la voiture. Envoyez les pompiers immédiatement!\\",
    },
]

async def generate\(client, caller\):
    r = await client.post\(
        f'{ELEVENLABS_TTS_URL}/{caller[\\"voice_id\\"]}',
        headers={'xi-api-key': settings.elevenlabs_api_key, 'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
        json={'text': caller['text'], 'model_id': 'eleven_turbo_v2_5', 'voice_settings': {'stability': 0.7, 'similarity_boost': 0.8}},
    \)
    r.raise_for_status\(\)
    with open\(caller['file'], 'wb'\) as f:
        f.write\(r.content\)
    print\(f'Created {caller[\\"file\\"]} \({len\(r.content\)} bytes\)'\)

async def main\(\):
    async with httpx.AsyncClient\(timeout=60.0\) as client:
        await asyncio.gather\(*[generate\(client, c\) for c in CALLERS]\)

asyncio.run\(main\(\)\)
")

Bash(uv run python -c "
import asyncio, time, json
from src.services.media import extract_frame
from src.agents.vision_agent import analyze_frame
from src.config import settings
from mistralai import Mistral

async def test\(\):
    # 1. Extract frame from video
    t0 = time.time\(\)
    frame = await extract_frame\('assets/crash_video.mp4', timestamp_s=58\)
    print\(f'[{time.time\(\)-t0:.2f}s] Frame extracted: {len\(frame\)} bytes'\)

    # 2. Send to Mistral vision model
    client = Mistral\(api_key=settings.mistral_api_key\)
    t1 = time.time\(\)
    try:
        analysis = await asyncio.to_thread\(
            lambda: analyze_frame.__wrapped__\(client, frame, 1\) if hasattr\(analyze_frame, '__wrapped__'\) else None
        \)
        # analyze_frame is async, call it directly
        analysis = await analyze_frame\(client, frame, frame_id=1\)
        print\(f'[{time.time\(\)-t1:.2f}s] Vision analysis complete'\)
        print\(f'  Description: {analysis.overall_description}'\)
        print\(f'  Smoke: {analysis.smoke_visible}'\)
        print\(f'  Fire: {analysis.fire_visible}'\)
        print\(f'  Damage: {analysis.vehicle_damage_severity}'\)
        print\(f'  Detections: {[d.model_dump\(\) for d in analysis.detections]}'\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'[{time.time\(\)-t1:.2f}s] Vision FAILED: {e}'\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(uv run python -c "
import asyncio, time, json
from src.services.media import extract_frame
from src.agents.vision_agent import analyze_frame, compute_scene_delta
from src.config import settings
from mistralai import Mistral

async def test\(\):
    client = Mistral\(api_key=settings.mistral_api_key\)
    
    # Frame 1 at 58s \(should show smoke\)
    print\('=== Frame 1 \(t=58s\) ==='\)
    t0 = time.time\(\)
    frame1 = await extract_frame\('assets/crash_video.mp4', timestamp_s=58\)
    print\(f'[{time.time\(\)-t0:.2f}s] Extracted: {len\(frame1\):,} bytes'\)
    
    t1 = time.time\(\)
    analysis1 = await analyze_frame\(client, frame1, frame_id=1\)
    print\(f'[{time.time\(\)-t1:.2f}s] Vision analysis complete'\)
    print\(f'  Description: {analysis1.overall_description}'\)
    print\(f'  Smoke: {analysis1.smoke_visible}'\)
    print\(f'  Fire: {analysis1.fire_visible}'\)
    print\(f'  Damage: {analysis1.vehicle_damage_severity}'\)
    print\(f'  Detections: {[d.model_dump\(\) for d in analysis1.detections]}'\)
    
    # Frame 2 at 66s \(should show fire\)
    print\(\)
    print\('=== Frame 2 \(t=66s\) ==='\)
    t2 = time.time\(\)
    frame2 = await extract_frame\('assets/crash_video.mp4', timestamp_s=66\)
    print\(f'[{time.time\(\)-t2:.2f}s] Extracted: {len\(frame2\):,} bytes'\)
    
    t3 = time.time\(\)
    analysis2 = await analyze_frame\(client, frame2, frame_id=2\)
    print\(f'[{time.time\(\)-t3:.2f}s] Vision analysis complete'\)
    print\(f'  Description: {analysis2.overall_description}'\)
    print\(f'  Smoke: {analysis2.smoke_visible}'\)
    print\(f'  Fire: {analysis2.fire_visible}'\)
    print\(f'  Damage: {analysis2.vehicle_damage_severity}'\)
    print\(f'  Detections: {[d.model_dump\(\) for d in analysis2.detections]}'\)
    
    # Scene delta
    print\(\)
    print\('=== Scene Delta ==='\)
    delta = compute_scene_delta\(analysis1, analysis2\)
    print\(f'  New hazard: {delta[\\"new_hazard\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'  Hazard escalation: {delta[\\"hazard_escalation\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'  Description: {delta[\\"description\\"]}'\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

from fastapi.testclient import TestClient
from src.main import app

client = TestClient\(app\)

# Check existing case data
cases = client.get\('/api/v1/demo/cases'\)
print\('Existing cases:', cases.json\(\)\)

# Test report on existing case if any
data = cases.json\(\)
if data.get\('cases'\):
    case_id = data['cases'][0]['case_id']
    print\(f'\\nTesting report for: {case_id}'\)
    resp = client.get\(f'/report/{case_id}'\)
    print\(f'Status: {resp.status_code}'\)
    print\(f'Content-Type: {resp.headers.get\(\\"content-type\\"\)}'\)
    print\(f'HTML length: {len\(resp.text\)} chars'\)
    # Check it contains key elements
    assert 'Case ' + case_id in resp.text
    assert 'DISPATCH' in resp.text
    print\('Report renders OK'\)
else:
    print\('No existing cases to test report against'\)
" 2>&1)

from elevenlabs import ElevenLabs
import inspect

# Check realtime
client = ElevenLabs\(api_key='test'\)
rt = client.speech_to_text.realtime
print\('realtime type:', type\(rt\)\)
print\('realtime dir:', [x for x in dir\(rt\) if not x.startswith\('_'\)]\)
print\(\)

# Check connect method signature
if hasattr\(rt, 'connect'\):
    print\('connect sig:', inspect.signature\(rt.connect\)\)
print\(\)

# Check available top-level imports
import elevenlabs
for name in ['RealtimeEvents', 'RealtimeAudioOptions', 'AudioFormat', 'CommitStrategy', 'SpeechToTextRealtimeClient']:
    if hasattr\(elevenlabs, name\):
        obj = getattr\(elevenlabs, name\)
        print\(f'{name}: {type\(obj\).__name__}'\)
        if hasattr\(obj, '__members__'\):
            print\(f'  members: {list\(obj.__members__.keys\(\)\)}'\)
        elif isinstance\(obj, type\):
            print\(f'  attrs: {[x for x in dir\(obj\) if not x.startswith\(\\"_\\"\)]}'\)

from src.services.scribe_realtime import ScribeRealtimeService, FeedRegistry, _is_silence

from src.services.media import extract_frame, extract_audio_pcm

from src.services.transcription import transcribe_audio, translate_to_english
print\('transcription.py: OK'\)

from src.services.orchestrator import DemoOrchestrator
print\('orchestrator.py: OK'\)

from src.routes.demo import router
print\('demo.py: OK'\)

from src.services.state import StateManager
print\('state.py: OK'\)

# Test silence detection with synthetic data
import struct
silent_chunk = struct.pack\('<4000h', *\([0] * 4000\)\)
loud_chunk = struct.pack\('<4000h', *\([10000] * 4000\)\)
assert _is_silence\(silent_chunk\) == True, 'Silent chunk should be silent'
assert _is_silence\(loud_chunk\) == False, 'Loud chunk should not be silent'
print\('Silence detection: OK'\)

# Test FeedRegistry
reg = FeedRegistry\(\)
assert reg.get_feed_id\('es'\) == 'FEED_1'
assert reg.get_feed_id\('zh'\) == 'FEED_2'
assert reg.get_feed_id\('es'\) == 'FEED_1'  # Same language = same feed
assert reg.languages == ['es', 'zh']
print\('FeedRegistry: OK'\)

print\(\)
print\('ALL IMPORTS AND UNIT TESTS PASSED'\)

feat: Scribe v2 Realtime integration — event-driven orchestrator with minimal-latency agent pipeline

Replace batch Scribe v1 HTTP transcription with Scribe v2 Realtime WebSocket streaming.
Each committed transcript chunk immediately triggers translate → intake → triage → dispatch
as a concurrent task, so recommended actions surface while audio is still streaming.

New: scribe_realtime.py \(WebSocket service\), PCM extraction, Mistral translation,
live_partials + demo_control tables \(migration 007\). Orchestrator fully rewritten from
6 sequential sleep-based phases to event-driven callbacks. All 51 existing tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(PYTHONPATH=. uv run python -c "
import time
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, call
from src.models.triage import EvidenceFusionResult, Corroboration
from src.models.incident import Severity
from src.services.orchestrator import DemoOrchestrator, VISION_FRAME_2_S
from src.services.state import StateManager

# --- Mock deps and state ---
mock_deps = MagicMock\(\)
mock_deps.case_id = 'TEST-001'

mock_state = MagicMock\(spec=StateManager\)
mock_state.case_id = 'TEST-001'
mock_state.start_time = time.time\(\)

# Build orchestrator
orch = DemoOrchestrator\(mock_deps, mock_state\)

# --- Simulate cross-modal fusion result \(vision + audio\) ---
fusion = EvidenceFusionResult\(
    corroborations=[
        Corroboration\(
            claim='fire',
            sources=[
                {'type': 'vision', 'confidence': 0.99},
                {'type': 'caller_3', 'confidence': 0.85, 'language': 'FR'},
            ],
            status='corroborated',
            combined_confidence=0.985,
        \),
    ],
    severity_delta='HIGH -> CRITICAL',
    new_severity=Severity.CRITICAL,
    evacuation_warning_required=True,
    reasoning='Fire detected by CCTV at frame 2 and independently reported by French speaker. Cross-modal corroboration confirms active fire hazard.',
\)

# --- Call the method \(vision path\) ---
orch._log_fusion_result\(fusion, vision_frame=2\)

# --- Inspect what state.log was called with ---
print\('=== state.log\(\) calls ==='\)
print\(\)
for i, c in enumerate\(mock_state.log.call_args_list\):
    args, kwargs = c
    print\(f'--- Call {i+1} ---'\)
    print\(f'  agent:      {args[0]}'\)
    print\(f'  event_type: {args[1]}'\)
    print\(f'  message:'\)
    for line in args[2].split\(chr\(10\)\):
        print\(f'    {line}'\)
    print\(f'  color:      {kwargs.get\(\\"color\\", \\"?\\"\)}'\)
    print\(f'  flash:      {kwargs.get\(\\"flash\\", \\"?\\"\)}'\)
    print\(f'  model:      {kwargs.get\(\\"model\\", \\"?\\"\)}'\)
    if kwargs.get\('data'\):
        d = kwargs['data']
        print\(f'  data.cross_modal:    {d.get\(\\"cross_modal\\"\)}'\)
        print\(f'  data.modalities:     {d.get\(\\"modalities\\"\)}'\)
        print\(f'  data.combined_conf:  {d.get\(\\"combined_confidence\\"\)}'\)
        print\(f'  data.severity_delta: {d.get\(\\"severity_delta\\"\)}'\)
        print\(f'  data.evacuation:     {d.get\(\\"evacuation_triggered\\"\)}'\)
    print\(\)

# --- Assertions ---
calls = mock_state.log.call_args_list
assert len\(calls\) == 2, f'Expected 2 log calls, got {len\(calls\)}'

# Call 1: cross-modal corroboration
args1, kw1 = calls[0]
assert args1[0] == 'evidence_fusion', f'Agent should be evidence_fusion, got {args1[0]}'
assert args1[1] == 'CROSS_MODAL_CORROBORATION', f'Event type wrong: {args1[1]}'
assert 'FIRE confirmed by 2 independent modalities' in args1[2], f'Missing modality line in: {args1[2]}'
assert 'Vision:' in args1[2], f'Missing Vision source'
assert 'Audio:' in args1[2], f'Missing Audio source'
assert 'T+38s' in args1[2], f'Missing frame timestamp in: {args1[2]}'
assert 'Autonomous evacuation protocol triggered' in args1[2], f'Missing evacuation note'
assert kw1['model'] == 'mistral-large-latest', f'Model wrong: {kw1[\\"model\\"]}'
assert kw1['color'] == 'red', f'Color should be red for evacuation, got {kw1[\\"color\\"]}'
assert kw1['flash'] == True
assert kw1['data']['cross_modal'] == True
assert kw1['data']['combined_confidence'] == 0.985

# Call 2: reasoning
args2, kw2 = calls[1]
assert args2[0] == 'evidence_fusion'
assert args2[1] == 'reasoning'
assert 'Cross-modal' in args2[2]

print\('=== ALL ASSERTIONS PASSED ==='\)
" 2>&1)

import time
from unittest.mock import MagicMock
from src.models.triage import EvidenceFusionResult, Corroboration
from src.services.orchestrator import DemoOrchestrator

mock_deps = MagicMock\(\)
mock_deps.case_id = 'TEST-002'
mock_state = MagicMock\(\)

orch = DemoOrchestrator\(mock_deps, mock_state\)

# Two callers corroborate same claim — no vision involved
fusion = EvidenceFusionResult\(
    corroborations=[
        Corroboration\(
            claim='trapped person in vehicle',
            sources=[
                {'type': 'caller_1', 'confidence': 0.88, 'language': 'ES'},
                {'type': 'caller_2', 'confidence': 0.82, 'language': 'ZH'},
            ],
            combined_confidence=0.978,
        \),
    ],
    evacuation_warning_required=False,
    reasoning='Two independent callers report person trapped.',
\)

orch._log_fusion_result\(fusion, segment_index=3\)

args, kw = mock_state.log.call_args_list[0]
print\(f'agent:      {args[0]}'\)
print\(f'event_type: {args[1]}'\)
print\(f'message:'\)
for line in args[2].split\(chr\(10\)\):
    print\(f'  {line}'\)
print\(f'cross_modal: {kw[\\"data\\"][\\"cross_modal\\"]}'\)

# Should NOT be cross-modal \(both are audio\)
assert args[1] == 'CORROBORATION', f'Should be CORROBORATION not CROSS_MODAL, got {args[1]}'
assert kw['data']['cross_modal'] == False
assert kw['color'] == 'green', f'No evacuation = green, got {kw[\\"color\\"]}'
print\(\)
print\('=== AUDIO-ONLY FUSION TEST PASSED ==='\)
" 2>&1)

import asyncio, httpx
from src.config import settings

ELEVENLABS_TTS_URL = 'https://api.elevenlabs.io/v1/text-to-speech'

CALLERS = [
    {
        'file': 'assets/caller_1_spanish.mp3',
        'voice_id': 'pFZP5JQG7iQjIQuC4Bku',  # Lily - Spanish
        'text': '[panicked, breathing heavily] ¡Ayuda! ¡Por favor, ayuda! [crying] Hubo un choque terrible en la calle Market con la Quinta. Mi esposo está atrapado en el carro. ¡No puede salir! [urgently] Hay humo saliendo del motor. ¡Por favor, manden una ambulancia rápido! [sobbing]',
    },
    {
        'file': 'assets/caller_2_mandarin.mp3',
        'voice_id': 'nPczCjzI2devNBz1zQrb',  # Brian - Chinese
        'text': '[alarmed, speaking quickly] 喂，我要报警！Market街和第五街路口发生了严重的车祸！[urgently] 我看到后座有一个小孩在哭！车里好像有两个人受伤了。[panicked] 路上到处都是碎片，请快点派人来！快！',
    },
    {
        'file': 'assets/caller_3_french.mp3',
        'voice_id': 'XB0fDUnXU5powFXDhCwa',  # Charlotte - French
        'text': '[alarmed, speaking urgently] Allô, je suis le propriétaire du magasin en face! Il y a un accident grave sur Market Street! [panicked] Je vois de la fumée qui sort du moteur, et maintenant je crois que ça prend feu! [shouting] Il y a des gens qui essaient de sortir de la voiture! Envoyez les pompiers immédiatement!',
    },
]

async def generate\(client, caller\):
    r = await client.post\(
        f'{ELEVENLABS_TTS_URL}/{caller[\\"voice_id\\"]}',
        headers={'xi-api-key': settings.elevenlabs_api_key, 'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
        json={
            'text': caller['text'],
            'model_id': 'eleven_multilingual_v2',
            'voice_settings': {
                'stability': 0.35,
                'similarity_boost': 0.8,
                'style': 0.75,
                'speed': 1.15,
            },
        },
    \)
    r.raise_for_status\(\)
    with open\(caller['file'], 'wb'\) as f:
        f.write\(r.content\)
    print\(f'Created {caller[\\"file\\"]} \({len\(r.content\)} bytes\)'\)

async def main\(\):
    async with httpx.AsyncClient\(timeout=60.0\) as client:
        await asyncio.gather\(*[generate\(client, c\) for c in CALLERS]\)

asyncio.run\(main\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

        'voice_id': 'pFZP5JQG7iQjIQuC4Bku',
        'language_code': 'es',
        'text': '¡Ayuda! ¡Por favor, ayuda! Hubo un choque terrible en la calle Market con la Quinta. ¡Mi esposo está atrapado en el carro! ¡No puede salir! Hay humo saliendo del motor... ¡Por favor, manden una ambulancia rápido! ¡Rápido!',

Bash(uv run python -c "
import asyncio, httpx
from src.config import settings

API_KEY = settings.elevenlabs_api_key
TTS_URL = 'https://api.elevenlabs.io/v1/text-to-speech'
SFX_URL = 'https://api.elevenlabs.io/v1/sound-generation'
HEADERS = {'xi-api-key': API_KEY, 'Content-Type': 'application/json'}
OUT = 'assets/audio'

# Voice IDs
LILY    = 'pFZP5JQG7iQjIQuC4Bku'  # British female → Spanish caller
GEORGE  = 'JBFqnCBsd6RMkjVDRZzb'  # British male → English male panic
BRIAN   = 'nPczCjzI2devNBz1zQrb'   # Male → Mandarin
JESSICA = 'cgSgspJ2msm6clMCkdW9'   # Female → English female panic
DANIEL  = 'onwK4e9ZLuTAKqWW03F9'   # British male → French male
MATILDA = 'XrExE9yKIg1WjnnlVkGX'   # Professional female → evacuation authority

# ── SFX FILES \(#1-5, #14\) ──
SFX = [
    \('sfx_ambient_traffic.wav', 'Urban city street ambience with cars passing, distant car horns, tire sounds on wet road, evening traffic', 8.0, True\),
    \('sfx_crash.wav', 'Violent metal on metal car crash impact, glass shattering, crunching metal, scraping, debris scattering on asphalt', 3.0, False\),
    \('sfx_crowd_murmur.wav', 'Crowd of concerned bystanders murmuring, gasping, indistinct worried voices, growing tension, urban street', 15.0, True\),
    \('sfx_fire_crackle.wav', 'Engine fire crackling, hissing, popping, growing flames, metal expanding from heat', 12.0, True\),
    \('sfx_explosion.wav', 'Car engine fireball explosion, massive boom, shockwave, debris flying, then eerie silence with distant crackling', 5.0, False\),
    \('evac_alarm.wav', 'Emergency alert alarm tone, two short loud warning beeps, public address system alert signal', 2.0, False\),
]

# ── PANIC VOICES \(#6-10\) — short, 1-2 sec, high emotion ──
PANIC = [
    \('panic_es.wav', LILY, 'es', '¡Mira ese camión!'\),
    \('panic_en_male.wav', GEORGE, 'en', \\"That truck's not stopping!\\"\),
    \('panic_zh.wav', BRIAN, 'zh', '小心！快跑！'\),
    \('panic_en_female.wav', JESSICA, 'en', 'Oh my god— LOOK OUT!'\),
    \('panic_fr.wav', DANIEL, 'fr', 'Attention ! ATTENTION !'\),
]

# ── BYSTANDER REPORTS \(#11-13\) — 4-5 sec, high emotion ──
BYSTANDER = [
    \('bystander_es.wav', LILY, 'es', '¡Dios mío! ¡Market y la Quinta! ¡Mi esposo está atrapado en el carro! ¡No puede salir!'\),
    \('bystander_zh.wav', BRIAN, 'zh', '后座有个小孩！有个小孩在车里！快叫救护车！'\),
    \('bystander_fr.wav', DANIEL, 'fr', 'Le moteur est en feu ! Il faut reculer ! Reculez !'\),
]

# ── EVACUATION WARNINGS \(#15-17\) — calm, authoritative ──
EVAC = [
    \('evac_es.wav', MATILDA, 'es', '¡Atención! Se ha detectado fuego. ¡Evacúen el área inmediatamente!'\),
    \('evac_zh.wav', MATILDA, 'zh', '注意！检测到火灾。请立即撤离该区域！'\),
    \('evac_fr.wav', MATILDA, 'fr', 'Attention ! Incendie détecté. Évacuez la zone immédiatement !'\),
]

async def gen_sfx\(client, filename, prompt, duration, loop\):
    r = await client.post\(SFX_URL, headers=HEADERS, json={
        'text': prompt,
        'duration_seconds': duration,
        'prompt_influence': 0.5,
        'loop': loop,
    }\)
    r.raise_for_status\(\)
    path = f'{OUT}/{filename}'
    with open\(path, 'wb'\) as f:
        f.write\(r.content\)
    print\(f'[SFX] {filename} \({len\(r.content\)} bytes\)'\)

async def gen_tts\(client, filename, voice_id, lang, text, style_preset='panic'\):
    # Panic/bystander: low stability, high style, fast
    # Evacuation: high stability, low style, normal speed
    if style_preset == 'panic':
        settings_dict = {'stability': 0.25, 'similarity_boost': 0.85, 'style': 0.85, 'speed': 1.2}
    elif style_preset == 'evac':
        settings_dict = {'stability': 0.8, 'similarity_boost': 0.9, 'style': 0.3, 'speed': 1.0}
    else:
        settings_dict = {'stability': 0.35, 'similarity_boost': 0.85, 'style': 0.75, 'speed': 1.15}

    r = await client.post\(f'{TTS_URL}/{voice_id}', headers=HEADERS, json={
        'text': text,
        'model_id': 'eleven_multilingual_v2',
        'language_code': lang,
        'voice_settings': settings_dict,
    }\)
    r.raise_for_status\(\)
    path = f'{OUT}/{filename}'
    with open\(path, 'wb'\) as f:
        f.write\(r.content\)
    print\(f'[TTS] {filename} \({len\(r.content\)} bytes\)'\)

async def main\(\):
    async with httpx.AsyncClient\(timeout=120.0\) as client:
        tasks = []
        # SFX
        for fname, prompt, dur, loop in SFX:
            tasks.append\(gen_sfx\(client, fname, prompt, dur, loop\)\)
        # Panic voices
        for fname, vid, lang, text in PANIC:
            tasks.append\(gen_tts\(client, fname, vid, lang, text, 'panic'\)\)
        # Bystander reports
        for fname, vid, lang, text in BYSTANDER:
            tasks.append\(gen_tts\(client, fname, vid, lang, text, 'bystander'\)\)
        # Evacuation warnings
        for fname, vid, lang, text in EVAC:
            tasks.append\(gen_tts\(client, fname, vid, lang, text, 'evac'\)\)

        await asyncio.gather\(*tasks\)

asyncio.run\(main\(\)\)
print\('Done — all 17 files generated.'\)
" 2>&1)

JESSICA = 'cgSgspJ2msm6clMCkdW9'   # Female → English
DANIEL  = 'onwK4e9ZLuTAKqWW03F9'   # Male → French
MATILDA = 'XrExE9yKIg1WjnnlVkGX'   # Female → Evacuation authority

async def gen_sfx\(client, fname, prompt, dur, loop\):
    r = await client.post\(SFX_URL, headers=HEADERS, json={
        'text': prompt, 'duration_seconds': dur, 'prompt_influence': 0.5, 'loop': loop,
    }\)
    r.raise_for_status\(\)
    with open\(f'{OUT}/{fname}', 'wb'\) as f: f.write\(r.content\)
    print\(f'  [SFX] {fname:30s} {len\(r.content\):>8,} bytes'\)

async def gen_tts\(client, fname, vid, lang, text, preset\):
    vs = {
        'panic':     {'stability': 0.25, 'similarity_boost': 0.85, 'style': 0.85, 'speed': 1.2},
        'bystander': {'stability': 0.30, 'similarity_boost': 0.85, 'style': 0.75, 'speed': 1.15},
        'evac':      {'stability': 0.80, 'similarity_boost': 0.90, 'style': 0.30, 'speed': 1.0},
    }[preset]
    r = await client.post\(f'{TTS_URL}/{vid}', headers=HEADERS, json={
        'text': text, 'model_id': 'eleven_multilingual_v2', 'language_code': lang, 'voice_settings': vs,
    }\)
    r.raise_for_status\(\)
    with open\(f'{OUT}/{fname}', 'wb'\) as f: f.write\(r.content\)
    print\(f'  [TTS] {fname:30s} {len\(r.content\):>8,} bytes'\)

async def batch\(client, jobs\):
    """Run a batch of jobs concurrently."""
    await asyncio.gather\(*jobs\)

async def main\(\):
    async with httpx.AsyncClient\(timeout=120.0\) as c:
        # Batch 1: SFX \(6 files, 2 at a time\)
        print\('Batch 1/5: SFX...'\)
        await batch\(c, [
            gen_sfx\(c, 'sfx_ambient_traffic.wav', 'Urban city street ambience, cars passing, distant horns, tire sounds, evening atmosphere', 8.0, True\),
            gen_sfx\(c, 'sfx_crash.wav', 'Violent metal on metal car crash collision, glass shattering, crunching metal, scraping debris on asphalt, one-shot impact', 3.0, False\),
        ]\)

        print\('Batch 2/5: SFX...'\)
        await batch\(c, [
            gen_sfx\(c, 'sfx_crowd_murmur.wav', 'Crowd of concerned bystanders murmuring on a city street, gasps, indistinct worried voices, growing tension', 15.0, True\),
            gen_sfx\(c, 'sfx_fire_crackle.wav', 'Car engine fire crackling, hissing, popping, growing flames, metal expanding and groaning from heat', 12.0, True\),
        ]\)

        print\('Batch 3/5: SFX...'\)
        await batch\(c, [
            gen_sfx\(c, 'sfx_explosion.wav', 'Car engine fireball explosion, massive boom, shockwave, debris flying, then eerie near-silence with faint distant crackling', 5.0, False\),
            gen_sfx\(c, 'evac_alarm.wav', 'Emergency public address alert tone, two short loud electronic warning beeps, attention signal', 2.0, False\),
        ]\)

        # Batch 4: Panic + Bystander voices \(8 files, 2 at a time\)
        print\('Batch 4/5: Panic + Bystander voices...'\)
        await batch\(c, [
            gen_tts\(c, 'panic_es.wav', LILY, 'es', '¡Mira ese camión!', 'panic'\),
            gen_tts\(c, 'panic_en_male.wav', GEORGE, 'en', "That truck's not stopping!", 'panic'\),
        ]\)
        await batch\(c, [
            gen_tts\(c, 'panic_zh.wav', BRIAN, 'zh', '小心！快跑！', 'panic'\),
            gen_tts\(c, 'panic_en_female.wav', JESSICA, 'en', 'Oh my god— LOOK OUT!', 'panic'\),
        ]\)
        await batch\(c, [
            gen_tts\(c, 'panic_fr.wav', DANIEL, 'fr', 'Attention ! ATTENTION !', 'panic'\),
            gen_tts\(c, 'bystander_es.wav', LILY, 'es', '¡Dios mío! ¡Market y la Quinta! ¡Mi esposo está atrapado en el carro! ¡No puede salir!', 'bystander'\),
        ]\)
        await batch\(c, [
            gen_tts\(c, 'bystander_zh.wav', BRIAN, 'zh', '后座有个小孩！有个小孩在车里！快叫救护车！', 'bystander'\),
            gen_tts\(c, 'bystander_fr.wav', DANIEL, 'fr', 'Le moteur est en feu ! Il faut reculer ! Reculez !', 'bystander'\),
        ]\)

        # Batch 5: Evacuation warnings \(3 files\)
        print\('Batch 5/5: Evacuation warnings...'\)
        await batch\(c, [
            gen_tts\(c, 'evac_es.wav', MATILDA, 'es', '¡Atención! Se ha detectado fuego. ¡Evacúen el área inmediatamente!', 'evac'\),
            gen_tts\(c, 'evac_zh.wav', MATILDA, 'zh', '注意！检测到火灾。请立即撤离该区域！', 'evac'\),
        ]\)
        await batch\(c, [
            gen_tts\(c, 'evac_fr.wav', MATILDA, 'fr', 'Attention ! Incendie détecté. Évacuez la zone immédiatement !', 'evac'\),
        ]\)

    print\(f'\\nDone — {len\(os.listdir\(OUT\)\)} files in {OUT}/'\)

asyncio.run\(main\(\)\)
PYEOF)
